text: User: I need more logging whneever the daemon does something, when it routes to a session, when it starts a new agent, why it started it, when it creates a new ordinal, why it created it, etc, etc -- use 5 sonnet parallel agents to decide stuff like this to log -- ideally I'll be able to run `tenex-edge daemon` and see colorized output on stdout in addition to seeing the same ouput written to a daemon.log file [...] **Task 1**: Add comprehensive logging to the `tenex-edge` daemon. When running `tenex-edge daemon`, produce colorized output on stdout AND write the same to daemon.log simultaneously. Log all key daemon operations: routing to sessions, starting new agents (with reasons), ordinal creation (with reasons), subscriptions, relay events. Use 5 parallel Sonnet agents to decide what to log in each subsystem.
